summary: Admin Console refactor testing complete. All 10 feature tests passed. The new 6-tab navigation structure is working correctly with Dashboard, Films, The Armory, The Den, Assets, and Studio tabs. All sub-features verified including Dashboard sections, Studio sub-tabs, Assets collection filters, and Armory category changes.

tests_passed: Main Navigation - 6 tabs present (Dashboard, Films, The Armory, The Den, Assets, Studio) - PASS
Dashboard Tab - 3 sections present (Overview, Activity Feed, Email Campaigns) - PASS
Activity Feed - 4 filters present (All, Messages, Submissions, CineConnect) - PASS
Studio Tab - 3 sub-tabs present (Portal, Comms, Settings) - PASS
Studio > Portal - User management and audit logs present - PASS
Studio > Comms - Subscribers and Templates internal tabs present - PASS
Studio > Settings - 5 page headers present (Films, Armory, Den, Work With Us, About) - PASS
Assets Tab - 5 collection filters present (All, Films, Website, Armory, Den) - PASS
Armory Tab - 4 categories only (Apps, Downloads, Courses, eBooks) - Templates REMOVED - PASS
Legacy Route Redirects - activity->dashboard, newsletter->studio/comms, site-settings->studio/settings - PASS

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin console refactor complete and tested. The 6-tab navigation (Dashboard, Films, The Armory, The Den, Assets, Studio) is working. Dashboard has merged Activity tab. Studio has merged Newsletter, Templates, and Site Settings. Armory Templates category merged into Downloads. All legacy URL redirects working via query parameters on /admin/dashboard route.
